required_preferences.fact: Spends daily in-person time with her parents at home and only video calls extended family in Seattle when needed

supersedes.fact: Video calls her parents every Sunday — never misses a week unless traveling

required_preferences.fact: Meets her ex in person for occasional, friendly catch-ups to discuss mutual connections; text chats remain limited to coordination or logistical topics — personal matters and emotions are still off-limits in all communication.

supersedes.fact: Text-chats with her ex only about mutual friends — never discusses personal matters

required_preferences.fact: Volunteers monthly at the local animal shelter — prefers helping cats over other animals
Researches local medical resources and heart health support groups for caregivers, preferring recommendations from her father's cardiologist
Shares weekly project updates through visual dashboards rather than lengthy written reports
Brings a refillable water bottle everywhere — avoids bottled or sweetened drinks

persona: A mid-level business analyst at a multinational retail corporation
